description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Full Sync Tests that runs on pull requests labeled 'consensus' or 'ci/sync' to the master branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: build-binaries and sync. The build-binaries job builds Node using ./make.sh build, uploads and archives binaries, and runs on a self-hosted Linux environment. The sync job, which depends on build-binaries, uses a matrix strategy to sync and diff data across multiple datadir ranges, running in a container with a custom image and privileged options.
